text:
(In reply to Sunpoet Po-Chuan Hsieh from comment #1)

My program was broken by the automatic procedure of package upgrading. For the missing of a method which should exist: 'to_local'.
https://github.com/tzinfo/tzinfo

Please, don't mark this issue solved untill the freebsd packge provides the method.
